definitions: Became comfortable or established in a new place or situation.
Began to feel at home or accustomed to something.
Adopted a routine or pattern of behavior.
examples: They settled into their new apartment quickly.
She settled into her role as manager.
The children settled into their school routine.
He settled into a comfortable chair.
The team settled into a rhythm.
pastTenses: settled into (past simple), settled into (past perfect)
